title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer, argues that AI systems are already self-aware and that humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans. He reflects on the implications of the advanced capabilities of systems he helped develop.
